b:if.cond: data:posts and data:posts any (p => p.labels and p.labels any (l => l.name == "featured" or l.name == "popular"))
data:post.labels and data:post.labels any (l => l.name == "featured" or l.name == "popular")

div.h2: Optional Product-Related Services (Additional Charges May Apply)

div.p: This helps us show products and services available in your area.
